testcase.name: test_get_transactions_list

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: Error 
Cannot GET /api/transactions
assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.failure:
test_reports/pytest/test_invoice.py:61: in test_get_transactions_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: E E E E Error E E E 
Cannot GET /api/transactions
E E E E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = .status_code
